description: Fix Luna clan temple shinto limit: change from 'max 2 total across all temples' to 'max 2 per temple'. Also add per-temple limit of 1 for non-Luna clans. Add console.warn feedback when placement is blocked.
steps: 1. In doRecruitPlaceTempleShinto (src/store/gameStore.ts ~line 484): Change Luna check to count shintos only in the targeted temple (templeId), not all temples combined. Change limit check from totalTempleShinto to per-temple count.
2. Add a per-temple limit of 1 for non-Luna clans before the Luna check.
3. In doKomainuPlaceAtTemple (~line 707): Apply the same fix - check per-temple count instead of total.
4. Add console.warn when placement is silently blocked so debugging is easier.
acceptance_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes with no errors
Luna clan can place up to 2 shintos per temple (not limited to 2 total across all temples)
Non-Luna clans are limited to 1 shinto per temple
Console warnings are logged when placement is blocked
verification: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0
findings: Fixed both doRecruitPlaceTempleShinto and doKomainuPlaceAtTemple. The bug was that the Luna check counted shintos across ALL temples instead of in the specific target temple. Also added a missing per-temple limit of 1 for non-Luna clans, which was completely absent. Added console.warn messages when placement is blocked for easier debugging.
